incidents.name: rag_slow
incidents.description: Knowledge base retrieval responds slowly (2.5s delay)
incidents.mitigation: Add caching layer, optimize vector search

incidents.name: tool_fail
incidents.root_cause: Vector database connection timeout or network issue
incidents.mitigation: Fallback to cached documents, retry with exponential backoff

incidents.name: cost_spike
incidents.description: LLM generates 4x more tokens than normal
incidents.mitigation: Add prompt constraint, use cheaper model, implement response truncation

incidents.name: account_lookup_slow
incidents.description: Account lookup service responds slowly (2-3s delay)
incidents.impact: P95 latency spike for account_balance and loan_status features
incidents.root_cause: Database query timeout on account_lookup table
incidents.mitigation: Add Redis caching layer, optimize SQL query with indexes

incidents.name: credit_check_fail
incidents.impact: Cannot process credit inquiries, 500 errors for credit_inquiry feature
incidents.root_cause: Credit bureau API timeout or network issue
incidents.mitigation: Fallback to cached credit data, retry with exponential backoff, notify customer

incidents.name: rate_limiter_triggered
incidents.description: Rate limiter kicks in due to high traffic
incidents.impact: 429 Too Many Requests errors, degraded service
incidents.root_cause: Concurrent requests exceed rate limit threshold (20+ concurrent)
incidents.detection: Monitor 429 error count, check request rate
incidents.mitigation: Increase rate limit, implement queue, scale horizontally, use CDN

incidents.name: high_token_usage
incidents.impact: Cost spike, budget overrun, slower response time
incidents.root_cause: LLM generating unnecessarily long responses for banking queries
incidents.mitigation: Shorten prompts, add response length constraint, use cheaper model for simple queries

incidents.name: core_banking_fail
incidents.impact: Cannot process any banking transactions, all features affected
incidents.root_cause: Core banking API down or network partition
incidents.mitigation: Show maintenance page, queue requests, notify customers, escalate to P1
